headline: European Scrutiny Of Tesla FSD Data Puts Growth Story At Risk
summary: Tesla is under scrutiny in Europe after regulators in Sweden and the Netherlands questioned safety data submitted for its Full Self-Driving system. Authorities argue Tesla relied on marketing driven metrics and comparisons that may not match real world FSD performance. Independent experts have also challenged Tesla's claims that FSD is significantly safer than human drivers. The dispute raises questions about Tesla's plan to broaden FSD availability in European markets. Tesla, traded as...

headline: The Mag 7 plus these three AI companies make up the new Fab 10
summary: The Magnificent Seven plus SpaceX (SPCX), Anthropic (ANTH.PVT), and OpenAI (OPAI.PVT) equal the Fab 10. Could this trio of AI mega-IPOs bring enthusiasm back to the tech space previously dominated by the Mag 7? Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Ines Ferré and Innovator From Goldman Sachs Asset Management chief investment strategist Tim Urbanowicz weigh in on the renewed investor sentiment these companies could bring to the AI trade. The Magnificent Seven consists of Meta Platforms (META), Microsoft (MSFT), Alphabet (GOOGL, GOOG), Amazon (AMZN), Apple (AAPL), Nvidia (NVDA), and Elon Musk's Tesla (TSLA).

The Magnificent Seven consists of Meta Platforms (META), Microsoft (MSFT), Alphabet (GOOGL, GOOG), Amazon (AMZN), Apple (AAPL), Nvidia (NVDA), and Elon Musk's Tesla (TSLA).

headline: SpaceX options debut in record volume, signaling strong investor interest
summary: Trading in SpaceX options kicked off with heavy volume on Tuesday, underscoring strong investor demand for ‌a new way to bet on the future of Elon Musk's aerospace ‌company.  More than half a million contracts changed hands in the first hour of trading as investors piled into ​the newly listed company, making SpaceX the most heavily traded name ever among companies on their first day of trading options, according to Trade Alert data.  "Early option volume indicates another SpaceX success," said Seth Hickle, chief investment officer at Mindset Wealth Management.

More than half a million contracts changed hands in the first hour of trading as investors piled into ​the newly listed company, making SpaceX the most heavily traded name ever among companies on their first day of trading options, according to Trade Alert data.  "Early option volume indicates another SpaceX success," said Seth Hickle, chief investment officer at Mindset Wealth Management.

headline: Goldman Sachs Raises Tesla Delivery Forecast as Second-Quarter Performance Appears Stronger Than Expected (TSLA)
summary: Tesla Deliveries Seen Beating Market ExpectationsTesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) could report second-quarter vehicle deliveries above current Wall Street forecasts, according to Goldman Sachs, which has increased its projection ahead of the company’s upcoming delivery update. Analyst Mark Delaney said the bank now expects Tesla to deliver 420,000 vehicles during the second quarter of 2026, up from its previous estimate of 405,000 units.

headline: Self-driving tech supplier Mobileye plans US robotaxi service next year
summary: Mobileye Global said on Tuesday it would launch its own robotaxi service in the United States next year, ‌putting the self-driving technology supplier in direct competition with some of ‌the very customers it serves.  The move places ‌Mobileye in a fiercely competitive ⁠U.S. market that includes Alphabet's Waymo, Tesla, and Amazon's Zoox, as rising investment in driverless technology intensifies the race ⁠for control over deployment and revenue.  "Operating our own service allows us to accelerate adoption, gain direct operational experience, and showcase the full potential of autonomous mobility," Mobileye ​CEO ​Amnon Shashua said.

content.title: Self-driving tech supplier Mobileye plans US robotaxi service next year

headline: What investors should know before hopping on SpaceX options trades
summary: While SpaceX (SPCX) holds onto stock gains in Tuesday's session, the options market has been abuzz today as more traders chase options contracts on the space company. YieldMax ETFs chief strategist Mike Khouw comes on Market Domination to speak more about what retail investors should beware of when hopping into options trades on a company fresh off of its IPO.

While SpaceX (SPCX) holds onto stock gains in Tuesday's session, the options market has been abuzz today as more traders chase options contracts on the space company.
